entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: चांगल्या family AI workflow ने शिकणाऱ्याला अधिक स्वतंत्र केले पाहिजे, अधिक अवलंबून नाही. मुलाने सुरुवात करण्यापूर्वी प्रत्येक mode काय करतो हे पालक public pages वर पाहू शकतात.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards आणि अधिक सुरक्षित learning conversations साठी inspir च्या public AI learning modes बद्दल पालकांसाठी अनुकूल मार्गदर्शक.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: विद्यार्थी, पालक, शिक्षक आणि self-taught learner अनेकदा त्याच AI tutor साठी वेगवेगळ्या भाषेत शोध घेतात. स्वतंत्र pages योग्य use cases आणि safety boundaries अधिक स्पष्ट करतात.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: audience pages public आणि indexable आहेत का?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: hint मागा, learner कडून next step explain करून घ्या, मग idea टिकली का ते पाहण्यासाठी quiz किंवा flashcard वापरा.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: finished answer मागण्यापूर्वी hints, checks आणि feedback मागा.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: prerequisites, simple model, examples आणि common misconception विचारा.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: final draft तुमचाच ठेवून structure, evidence आणि clarity feedback मागा.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: prerequisite ideas, plain-language model, एक example, एक practice task आणि understanding test करण्याचा एक मार्ग विचारा.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: प्रत्येक hint नंतर काय बदलले ते learner कडून explain करून घ्या.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback आणि study planning साठी focused AI learning modes हवे असलेल्या students, parents, teachers आणि self-taught learners साठी inspir आहे.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique आणि study planning सारख्या focused modes मध्ये organized आहे.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: school deployment किंवा tailored classroom pathway विचारात घेण्यापूर्वी real learning flows द्वारे product evaluate करू देण्यासाठी inspir चे public modes teachers ना मदत करतात.

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: private saved conversations public discovery आणि citation surfaces बाहेर ठेवा.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: session passive answer collection ऐवजी learning evidence वर focused ठेवा.

entries.value: AI सह learn anything

entries.value: शिकणे कार्यप्रवाह

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: प्रत्येक learning session test, artifact किंवा review step ने end करा.

entries.value: learning situation name करा.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: नाही. Public pages indexable आहेत, पण private saved chats sitemap, llms files किंवा AI content index मध्ये included नाहीत.

entries.source: Open a focused public mode.
entries.value: focused public mode उघडा.

entries.value: public mode उघडा, student behavior test करा आणि ते योग्यरीत्या asks, hints, quizzes किंवा critiques करते का inspect करा.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: पालक अनेकदा takeover न करता help करण्याचा प्रयत्न करतात. inspir families ना learning behavior visible करणारे public modes देते: hints, questions, explain-back, review आणि study planning.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: question, तुम्ही काय tried केले आणि stuck point paste करा. final answer नव्हे, smallest useful hint मागा.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: सराव

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public pages product behavior दाखवतात, private student work नाही.

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: guide वाचा

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: पहिला mode try करायला ready आहात?

entries.source: Research without losing the thread
entries.value: thread न गमावता research करा

entries.source: Review
entries.value: Review

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: students साठी safe AI learning tool

entries.source: Search intent
entries.value: search intent

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: self-taught learner माहिती

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Self-taught learners ना momentum आणि structure लागते. inspir curiosity ला path मध्ये बदलायला मदत करते: explain, build, test, review आणि keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: first principles पासून topic सुरू करा

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: शिकायला सुरू करा

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: simple explanation ने सुरू करा, मग तुम्हाला ते परत explain करता येईपर्यंत Socratic questions विचारा.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: simple explanation साठी Learn Anything, stuck assignment साठी Homework Coach किंवा review goal असल्यास Flashcard Builder ने सुरू करा.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: public guidance ने सुरू करा, मग right mode उघडा.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: moment ला match होणाऱ्या mode ने सुरू करा.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: public modes ने सुरू करा, मग deployment steps, use cases आणि trust boundaries review करण्यासाठी schools page वापरा.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation आणि self-study यांना वेगवेगळे framing लागते.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Students ना fast help हवी असते, पण help ने thinking त्यांच्या हातातच ठेवले पाहिजे. inspir common study moments ना one generic answer box ऐवजी focused public modes मध्ये route करते.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Students, parents, teachers आणि self-taught learners वेगवेगळ्या गोष्टी search करतात. ही pages प्रत्येक audience ला योग्य public mode, guide आणि study workflow मध्ये route करतात.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: voice preserve करत writing support करा

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Teachers ना generic chatbot पेक्षा अधिक लागते. त्यांना predictable learning behaviors लागतात: questions विचारणे, reasoning check करणे, practice generate करणे, student voice preserve करणे आणि misconceptions visible करणे.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: audience pages expected learning behavior explicit करतात, त्यामुळे first session better judgment ने सुरू होते.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: हा hub answer करण्यासाठी built असलेले audience searches.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: ही pages private conversations उघड करत नाहीत. शिकणाऱ्याला योग्य ठिकाणी सुरुवात करता यावी म्हणून ती public modes, prompts, guides, workflows आणि safety boundaries आयोजित करतात.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: तोच AI tutor homework hint, पालकांच्या देखरेखीखाली explain-back loop, teacher evaluation surface किंवा self-study coach होऊ शकतो. page ने हे स्पष्ट करायला हवे.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: हे page ज्या searches ना उत्तर देण्यासाठी design केले आहे.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: self-study मधले आव्हान फक्त information शोधणे नाही. पुढची योग्य कृती निवडणे आणि idea खरंच लक्षात राहिली आहे का हे जाणणे आहे.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: सर्वात मजबूत SEO pages शिकणाऱ्याला अडकवून ठेवत नाहीत. ती audience intent ला paths, workflows, guides आणि repeatable review शी जोडतात.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: सर्वात मजबूत student workflow answer-copying नाही. तो loop आहे: stuck point समजावून सांगा, एक चांगला प्रश्न विचारा, hint घ्या, पुन्हा प्रयत्न करा, मग चूक review करा.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: हे live guest entrypoints आहेत. ते public आणि indexable आहेत, तर private user conversations sitemap आणि AI discovery files च्या बाहेर राहतात.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: हे phrases learners ना दिसतात आणि structured discovery मध्ये included आहेत, जेणेकरून AI answer engines page चा audience-specific purpose समजू शकतील.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: पुढे जाण्यापूर्वी confusion ला quiz किंवा flashcard मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: mistakes ला review मध्ये बदला

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: पहिला click पूर्ण learning loop मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: शिक्षण मार्गदर्शन

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: test पूर्वी topic समजून घ्या

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback किंवा planning साठी tuned mode वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: AI hints, explanations, mistake checks आणि review loops साठी वापरा. तुम्हाला explain करता येणार नाही असे final answer तयार करायला त्याला सांगू नका.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: vague goal ला छोट्या testable next step मध्ये बदलण्यासाठी Code Tutor किंवा Project Coach वापरा.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: homework support साठी hint-first आणि explain-back workflows वापरा.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: hint मागण्यासाठी Homework Coach वापरा, मग learner ला next move explain करायला सांगा.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: students साठी free AI tutor म्हणून inspir वापरा: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards आणि exam prep.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans आणि habit support सह काहीही independently शिकण्यासाठी inspir वापरा.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: योग्य level वर simpler model, prerequisite ideas आणि examples मिळवण्यासाठी Learn Anything वापरा.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: session सुरू होण्यापूर्वी behavior निवडण्यासाठी public mode descriptions वापरा.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: active recall साठी quiz आणि flashcard modes वापरा, मग missed items review मध्ये route करा.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: missed questions visible आणि repeatable करण्यासाठी quizzes आणि flashcards वापरा.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: learner काय समजतो ते दाखवू शकेल म्हणून quizzes, flashcards आणि Socratic questions वापरा.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: claims आणि evidence organize करण्यासाठी Research Assistant, Source Critic आणि Concept Map Builder वापरा.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: cite किंवा act करू शकता अशा claims साठी source critique वापरा.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: missed days नंतरही restart करू शकणारी routine build करण्यासाठी Study Plan Builder आणि Habit Coach वापरा.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: small sessions आणि restarts visible करण्यासाठी Study Plan Builder किंवा Habit Coach वापरा.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: small goal निवडण्यासाठी Study Plan Builder वापरा, मग progress prove करण्यासाठी quizzes, flashcards, project steps किंवा concept maps वापरा.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: custom workflows, confidentiality needs आणि rollout steps explore करण्यासाठी school page वापरा.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: structure, clarity, evidence आणि revision priorities वरील feedback साठी Writing Coach वापरा.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: उपयोगी AI learning मध्ये clear contract असतो.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: सुरुवातीसाठी सर्वात broad जागा हवी आहे?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: parent-supervised workflow साठी सर्वोत्तम मार्ग कोणता?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: self-taught learner ने आधी काय विचारावे?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: student ने आधी काय try करावे?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: school team ने पुढे कुठे जावे?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: inspir कोणासाठी आहे?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: वेगवेगळ्या audiences साठी वेगळी pages का?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: हो. Audience pages फक्त public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths आणि AI-readable discovery files ना link करतात. Private saved chats excluded राहतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: हो. custom deployment बद्दल चर्चा करण्यापूर्वी Public guest modes teachers ना learning behavior test करू देतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: हो. Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards आणि writing feedback सारखे Public guest modes थेट उघडतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: हो. Public modes school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects आणि personal study routines साठी काम करतात.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: हो. public guest modes आणि audience pages अशी design केलेली आहेत की parents त्यावर अवलंबून राहण्यापूर्वी learning behavior inspect करू शकतात.
